description: The SphereMesh component generates a sphere mesh for use with a MeshRenderer.

fields.Radius: The radius of the sphere mesh.
fields.Segments: how many vertical lined edges the sphere has
fields.Rings: how many horizontal lined edges the sphere has.
fields.Shading: Whether to have smooth or flat shading
fields.UVScale: the scale of material detail on the surface
fields.DualSided: whether to make a second set of polygons that shows the mesh when viewed from the inside.
